textByHashes.f4d9800a48078f2cc1ede398df83ed19bf43ce12: A human? Can we eat it?
textByHashes.d9b0f142acc2ba3aa7af9aee34ad6a2ead09a40e: Not like the trolls. We hate trolls.
textByHashes.2b2b105072d766cc32dfe5bd0387804cf65fa6e3: Except discovering that your pickaxe's gone blunt just as you-
textByHashes.878409e262354d3c1fb8063d3f37f5dd6c2538bb: I say, we don't get to see a hummon down here very often!
textByHashes.f2e462968dce905601ec7097366b7c7115771f7c: We're very good at answering questions!
textByHashes.baa10b605ae11eacfc12eb71b0b3f911b306ff85: The grand city of the dwarves!
textByHashes.38a42cc3d9fa5c89a7fa85efd305a692c4bc3d42: You have to keep busy, you see.
textByHashes.0d39a91da127258f3748360b8c5c2a3090f0d509: Besides, there's been some weird going ons in the city.
textByHashes.e89097facb4e2d9350fdda32f2bb5fee1aa2542e: Oh yes, they only just cleaned up the mess from the last little incident.
textByHashes.3deac8653fd58eea084bf85fc282848a2f2b297c: Since the mine carts don't come here.
textByHashes.c92d3826a6b2ce49459049a76f125eac89f7438a: Hey, it was just a suggestion!
textByHashes.719f2756a23f58c3fd9999ff20a9c8692d5b2efc: I think you're going to hurt your head.
textByHashes.a1e167ba7751cf135615e69dbb76a779efa1c746: I'd run away if I ever ran into an evil demon.
textByHashes.3fe4d61dd5b0193af8380fd36fbd32c34cfd0a5e: Well, what would you do then?
textByHashes.ea44761722a48ffaee80b424ecc9cb2f78c1c1f7: Oh yes, what did he say?
textByHashes.43149f14bf28a6b3d788487ff907a2f4dd8c059e: Oh yes, we should go down into Keldagrim to celebrate.
textByHashes.a5f129e626f9c83583975373f56937f82fbd5037: The company is going to be rich!
textByHashes.50f54344257ff4d09a6e4e96ba93811413aa85c7: Oh yes, what's the problem then?
textByHashes.b93cae9f819e4931b361025f4baeb76a8d64f767: I got this puzzle box once, you know.
textByHashes.a02b774dbfb8090910fd25ff29f00f48dabe7aa8: Well forget about it then. I'll shut up if you don't want to hear about it.
textByHashes.b5acabc505dbf0821d834702d76f9ad6306d86ab: You're going to talk to the Consortium?
textByHashes.f157990c08dc2ff29c6fd88b169f14151329decc: Oh yes, he was out there for quite a while.
textByHashes.5fee4a52a87b5cfcbef6b8eea148729e01635069: Nothing's too difficult for old Blasidar.
textByHashes.40d1807e5af15d8ee51ada042b546d4c7dfe0549: Speaking of, shouldn't we get back to work ourselves?
textByHashes.5f725a4a4031db76827231af090346d2bde56d13: Yeah, we know a drunken dwarf!
textByHashes.4f0022353716703410deb7afdd3527017eae9230: There's this one really annoying dwarf though, he sometimes throws rocks at me for no reason.
textByHashes.7f17be0d50a377cbbc96db76e45bb479b68ede94: And I understand he's the relative of that dwarf I mentioned earlier.
textByHashes.73d831b6fed7ea51558b9027369e0948163b997d: Like, there was this one time when I lost my spanner in the mines...
textByHashes.7b5ac30caf0264ea5d734fed295d80233ef50473: But my spanner... it's a very interesting tale you know.
textByHashes.8062ba9119ba766661ee59667bd9925660d5abfb: As long as it's better than my spanner story.
